name: Shepherd's Staff
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: At the start of the battle, the equipped gains Aliemus equal to [StateArg1]% of the wielder Aliemus Regen. After the equipped releases Exalt for the first time in each battle, this effect repeats once.
lore:
Vast flocks of sheep wander over vast grasslands.
There are many, many sheep in this world, and sheep are born to be led by a shepherd.
She has always been the prophet of this world, holding the staff of Knowledge.
She has always been a good shepherd, determined to lead the flock on the right path.
She disciplines the lambs with that staff, drives away the wolves with that staff.
She raises the shepherd's staff high, for she can always foresee the road ahead.
Once she led the flock to abundant water, to fresh pasture.
Now she sees the truth of the world, so she leads the flock into the ultimate embrace.
This way; don't look back.
She smiles, waving her staff of wisdom.
So the sheep cannot see the cliff ahead.
One by one.
The sheep fall, the shepherd sings.
Follow the selfless shepherd, for she has shown you the truest path.
Do not fear, even though you walk through the valley of the shadow of death, her staff is still with you.
Until you both step into the Abyss of annihilation.
